calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes CSR# 12365 (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-16-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came reglarly on calendar this day by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218 Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
Michael Keck, Esq., for Plaintiff James E. Plump.
Monica Wiley, Deputy City Attorney for Carl E. Cranford
Case settled. In exchange for payment in the sum of $13,500.00 from Defendant, City and County of San Francisco, Plaintiff will dismiss with prejudice all claims, causes of action and all parties. The settlement is subject to the approval of the Municipal Agency. Matter is placed on the CRC 225 Calendar for dismissal on August 16, 2005 at 10:00 A.M.
